---
title: "Facial cues to depressive symptoms and their associated personality attributions"
authors: "Scott, N., Kramer, R., Jones, A. L., & Ward, R."
year: 2013
date: 2013-01-01
pub-journal: "Psychiatry Research"
volume: "208(1)"
pages: "47–53"
doi: "10.1016/j.psychres.2013.02.027"
pdf: "assets/papers/2013/scott_etal_2013.pdf"
categories: [first-impressions]
---
